name: Morgan Stanley Depository Shares Representing 1/1000th Preferred Series 1 Fixed to Floating Non (Cum)
summary: Morgan Stanley Depository Shares Representing 1/1000th Preferred Series I Fixed to Floating Non (Cum) are depositary shares that represent a fractional interest in Morgan Stanley's preferred stock. The series I preferred stock initially pays a fixed dividend, which later converts to a floating rate. Dividends are non-cumulative, meaning that unpaid dividends do not accrue.
